facilities: {"kids_club":true,"spa":true,"specialty_features":["Suites: All suites feature private terraces, floor-to-ceiling windows, and walk-in wardrobes. Dining & Bars: Six restaurants including Anthology (fine dining), Sakura (Pan-Asian), and Emporium Marketplace (all-day dining). The ship includes 12 bars and lounges. Pools & Relaxation: The Conservatory Pool with a retractable glass roof, the adults-only Helios Pool, and the AsterM pool. Infinity-style whirlpools face outward for ocean views. Wellness & Spa: A comprehensive spa with 11 treatment rooms, including a thermal area, Finnish sauna, Himalayan salt cave, and ice fall. stateroom_breakdown: Explora III features 463 all-oceanfront suites across four main categories, focusing on space and luxury with private terraces. The breakdown includes 313 Ocean Suites, 109 Ocean Penthouses, 39 Ocean Residences, and 2 Owner's Residences. Suites range from 35 sq.m. (377 sq. ft.) up to large residences, all featuring butler service, high-end amenities, and floor-to-ceiling windows.
name: EXPLORA III

stateroom_breakdown:
Owner's Residence (2 Suites): The largest on-board accommodation (280 m²/3,015 ft²), including a 155 m² indoor space and a 125 m² aft-facing terrace featuring an infinity whirlpool, outdoor shower, and dining for 6–8.
Ocean Residences (39 Suites total):
Cocoon Residence (2 Suites): ~149 m² (1,605 ft²) with massive 75 m² aft-facing wraparound terraces on deck 6.
Serenity Residence (2 Suites): ~115 m² (1,215 ft²) with a 55 m² aft-facing wraparound terrace on deck 9.
Retreat Residence (6 Suites): ~77-81 m² (830–870 ft²) with bow-facing terraces, located on forward decks 7, 8, and 9.
Cove Residence (29 Suites): ~70–80 m² (755-860 ft²) with terrace whirlpools on decks 6, 7, 8, 9, and 10.
Penthouses (100 Suites total):
Grand Penthouse (11 Suites): ~60-68 m² (645–730 ft²), featuring separate living/sleeping areas and large terraces.
Premier Penthouse (65 Suites): ~52-61 m² (560–655 ft²), featuring king beds and extensive terrace space.
Deluxe/Standard Penthouse (27+6 Suites): Ranging from 43 to 48 m² (465–515 ft²).
Ocean Terrace Suites & Ocean Grand Terrace Suites (296 Suites): The standard category, offering 35–39 m² (375–420 ft²) of space, with 7–11 m² (75–120 ft²) private terraces.
name: EXPLORA VI

stateroom_breakdown: Explora V, scheduled for December 2027, features ultra-luxury, oceanfront suites designed with Scandinavian minimalism.
